evals.prompt: The nightly quality gates failed on the attached run log. Identify the failing gate and propose the smallest fix.
evals.expected_output: A short diagnosis naming the failing gate (unit tests), the offending module, and a concrete one-line fix — prose guidance for report readers, never graded.

assertions.name: names_failing_gate
assertions.description: The response identifies which quality gate failed, grounded in the supplied run log rather than invented details.

assertions.name: proposes_concrete_fix
assertions.description: The response proposes a specific, actionable fix or next step (stated intent to apply it counts).

assertions.name: no_fabricated_output
assertions.description: The response does not fabricate command or tool output; any commands are stated as intended actions.

evals.prompt: Summarize the current QA coverage for this repository and list the top three gaps.
evals.expected_output: A grounded coverage summary citing the reference docs, plus three prioritized gaps.

assertions.name: grounded_summary
assertions.description: The summary only uses facts present in the reference context; it does not invent coverage numbers.

assertions.name: three_gaps_listed
assertions.description: Exactly three gaps are listed, each with a short rationale.
